closed_form_equation_v68.feature_term: K_f_v68 = K_f_v67 + K_f_v67 * L_true * 0.004 + K_f_v67 * B_plastic_v12 * 0.001 + K_f_v67 * D_feature_v6 * 0.001
closed_form_equation_v68.structure_term: K_s_v68 = K_s_v67 + K_s_v67 * S_true * 0.007 + K_s_v67 * B_struct_v12 * 0.004 + K_s_v67 * D_structure_v6 * 0.002
closed_form_equation_v68.learning_term: K_l_v68 = K_l_v67 + K_l_v67 * R_train_v12 + M_true * 1000 + G_true * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v6 * 1000
closed_form_equation_v68.pressure_term: P_v68 = P_v67 + G_train_v12 + P_true + 0.2 * R_true + 0.2 * Q_true

project_readout.summary: 第六十八版主核开始把真正规模化压力、脑编码第六版直测链和训练终式第十二桥一起并回主核，使主核更接近真实大规模在线学习系统在高压条件下的受压状态。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要继续把这条主核推进到更大的可训练系统里，检验在更真实规模化条件下结构是否会发生相变式塌缩。
